name: Fresh Apple Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples, peeled and thinly sliced, or firm pears
1 cup Sour cream, or low-fat sour cream
1 Egg, or 1/4 cup Frozen cholesterol-free egg product, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix the cake mix (dry), margarine, brown sugar, and cinnamon until crumbly. Set aside 2/3 of this mixture.
3. Press the remaining crumbly mixture into the bottom of an ungreased rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches.
4. Arrange apple slices over the crumbly layer in the pan.
5. Beat sour cream and egg until blended; spread over the apples.
6. Sprinkle with the reserved crumbly mixture.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the topping is light golden brown. Allow to cool.
